executive_summary: This session shows strong engagement and confident presence. Focus on refining gesture size to match emphasis and ensure a quick return to audience-facing orientation after board or note checks. These adjustments will enhance clarity and connection.

top_strengths.title: Open-palm explanatory delivery
top_strengths.evidence: 00:30-00:45 included open-palm explanatory gestures that supported the explanation. 00:00-00:15 included open-palm explanatory gestures that supported the explanation.
top_strengths.what_to_repeat: Keep the same open-palm gesture shape when emphasizing key ideas.

top_strengths.title: Alert room presence
top_strengths.evidence: 00:00-00:15 kept the head and eyes visibly engaged with the room. 00:15-00:30 kept the head and eyes visibly engaged with the room.
top_strengths.what_to_repeat: Keep the same quick room checks that make the lecture feel attentive.

top_strengths.title: Upright confident presence
top_strengths.evidence: 00:00-00:15 held an upright, settled stance rather than a collapsed or guarded one. 00:15-00:30 held an upright, settled stance rather than a collapsed or guarded one.
top_strengths.what_to_repeat: Keep the same upright, settled stance between points and transitions.

top_strengths.title: Distributed room engagement
top_strengths.evidence: 00:00-00:15 showed attention moving across more than one part of the room. 00:45-01:00 showed attention moving across more than one part of the room.

priority_actions.title: Tighten the peak size of gestures
priority_actions.why_it_matters: Large bursts of motion can distract from the teaching point when they are not tightly timed.
priority_actions.what_we_saw: 00:00-00:15 had gesture peaks that looked larger than the teaching point required. 00:15-00:30 had gesture peaks that looked larger than the teaching point required.
priority_actions.what_to_try_next: Keep big gestures for true emphasis and use smaller controlled hand movements elsewhere.

additional_observation_inventory.title: Turn back toward the audience sooner
additional_observation_inventory.evidence: 00:30-00:45 spent longer than needed turned away from the audience after checks.
additional_observation_inventory.suggested_response: Check whether board or note checks end with a quick shoulder-and-chin reset back to the room.

low_confidence_watchlist.title: Turn back toward the audience sooner
low_confidence_watchlist.why_watch: The signal is visible, but it is not yet sustained enough to justify real corrective feedback.
